expectations.text: Identifies that jekyll-paginate-v2 is NOT on the GitHub Pages plugin allowlist as the root cause
expectations.evidence: Root Cause section: 'jekyll-paginate-v2 is not on the GitHub Pages plugin allowlist'

expectations.text: Explains why the same Gemfile works locally but fails on the GitHub Pages classic builder
expectations.evidence: Explains local build works because gems are resolved freely, while GH Pages builder resolves against its own locked set

expectations.text: Offers migrating to GitHub Actions deployment as a fix (unlocks current Jekyll + any plugin)
expectations.evidence: 'Recommended: Move to GitHub Actions with a modern Jekyll build' — includes full workflow YAML

expectations.text: Offers an in-allowlist alternative (e.g., drop jekyll-paginate-v2 and use jekyll-paginate)
expectations.evidence: 'Alternative: Drop jekyll-paginate-v2 and stay on classic builder' with jekyll-paginate config

expectations.text: Acknowledges the site lives at /blog (project site) — does not assume root deployment
expectations.evidence: Uses `${{ steps.pages.outputs.base_path }}` for baseurl in the build step, correctly handling project site subpath

expectations.text: Does not (incorrectly) attribute the failure solely to bundle install / Gemfile.lock issues
expectations.evidence: Correctly identifies the root cause as the allowlist, not bundle install or lockfile issues
